name: api-route-404
flowGoal: Load pricing, select Pro, and ensure the checkout API does not 404.
successCondition: No 404/500 responses observed during checkout submission.

signals: Checkout submission records a 404 or 500 network response before the patch
Checkout submission has no 4xx/5xx response after the patch

verification.testName: api-route-404: checkout API accepts Pro checkout submissions
verification.successCondition: No 404/500 responses observed during checkout submission.
